eas_text: A civil authority has issued A FIRE WARNING for the following counties or areas: Donley, TX; at 10:31 AM ON MAR 15, 2026 Effective until 11:01 AM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: Donley County Emergency Management: A Fire Warning has been issued for this area. There is a dangerous wildfire over Greenbelt Lake or 4 miles North of Clarendon. Smoke and fire will present a threat to life and property. Be prepared to evacuate quickly if requested by local officials.
